changelog:
First versioned release of this fork (9M2IBR), trimmed to the one board this fork targets (ESP32_9M2IBR_E22_400M22S, ESP32-D + Ebyte E22-400M22S/SX1268).
- Full codebase bug-fix sweep, including a Web Admin authentication bypass and a null-pointer crash on the /action endpoint, an unbounded APRS-IS connect loop that could hang boot forever, two stored-XSS holes in the Web UI, a checkbox-disable typo, an unbounded sprintf buffer write, a duplicated display redraw, a WiFi-reconnect counter bug, mismatched config defaults, a non-IRAM/non-volatile wake ISR, integer-truncated battery voltage math, a possible OTA divide-by-zero, a missing file-open check, and an A7670 modem connect/reconnect routine that could block forever.
- Replaced stale hardcoded firmware-version strings with the live version, and rebranded the "CA2RXU" software-identifier tags sent over APRS-IS/syslog to "9M2IBR" (original author copyright/credit retained per GPLv3).
- README rewritten to document the actual codebase, with an ongoing Changelog section.
